Everything was perfect. Excellent service and attention.
The gas station never fails. Fuel is expensive. I wonder why?

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para una parada. Más siendo socios uno siente que está en su club. SIN EMBARGO es increíble ver, año tras año, que a nadie se le ocurra poner sombra para los vehículos, mucho menos para las personas, que en verano se derriten al sol. La atención en el café deja muchísimo que desear, la empleada en la caja tiene un trato rudo y poco amable. Lamento mucho tener que comentar todo esto, pero tal vez sirva para mejorar

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to stop. Being a member makes you feel like you're in your own club. HOWEVER, it's incredible to see, year after year, that no one thinks to provide shade for the vehicles, much less for the people, who melt in the summer sun. The service at the café leaves much to be desired; the cashier is rude and unfriendly. I'm sorry to have to mention all this, but perhaps it will help them improve.
